textPlain: Recently had to familiarize myself with python async because a third party SDK relies on it.In many cases the lib will rely on threads to handle calls to synchronous functions, got me wondering if there's a valid use case for running multiple async threads on a single core.

> I’ll try and write a followup with benchmarks.That would definitely keep the story from being all-hat-and-no-cattle.  I can't recall reading something with so many alternate versions of how to implement something but with zero benchmarks.
